title: PlaneDef Method, Spel Class
syntax: Function PlaneDef (PlaneNumber As Integer) As Boolean
parameters: PlaneNumber	Integer expression representing the plane number from 1 to 15.
description: Returns whether a plane is defined.
see_also:
Plane, PlaneClr

PlaneDef Example

VB Example:

x = m_spel.PlaneDef(1)

C# Example:

x = m_spel.PlaneDef(1);
